svg.title: BariAccess agentic architecture — 5 layers from client apps down to cognitive data layer
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing React Native/Web client apps connecting via SDKs through Azure API Gateway to Ollie and AskABA Azure Function agents, which share a cognitive layer of Cosmos DB, Azure AI Search, Azure Blob, and Spike API Bridge.

g.text: JWT auth · rate limiting · session routing · patient_id binding
